hooks.commandWindows: if (Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { $root = if ($env:CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT) { $env:CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT } else { '.' }; python "$root\core\goal_guard.py" hook SessionStart }

hooks.command: root="${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-.}"; tmp=$(mktemp); trap 'rm -f "$tmp"' EXIT; cat > "$tmp"; out=$(python3 "$root/core/goal_guard.py" hook UserPromptSubmit < "$tmp"); if [ -n "$out" ]; then python3 "$root/core/goal_guard.py" start --root . < "$tmp" >&2; python3 "$root/core/goal_guard.py" hook UserPromptSubmit < "$tmp"; else printf "%s" "$out"; fi; exit 0
hooks.commandWindows: if (Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { $root = if ($env:CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT) { $env:CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT } else { '.' }; $tmp = New-TemporaryFile; $input | Set-Content -Path $tmp; $out = Get-Content $tmp | python "$root\core\goal_guard.py" hook UserPromptSubmit; if ($out) { Get-Content $tmp | python "$root\core\goal_guard.py" start --root . 1>&2; Get-Content $tmp | python "$root\core\goal_guard.py" hook UserPromptSubmit } else { $out }; Remove-Item $tmp }

hooks.command: root="${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-.}"; tmp=$(mktemp); trap 'rm -f "$tmp"' EXIT; cat > "$tmp"; python3 "$root/core/goal_guard.py" publish-gate --root . --hook < "$tmp"; rc=$?; if [ "$rc" -ne 0 ]; then exit "$rc"; fi; python3 "$root/core/goal_guard.py" hook PreToolUse; exit 0
hooks.commandWindows: if (Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { $root = if ($env:CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT) { $env:CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT } else { '.' }; $tmp = New-TemporaryFile; $input | Set-Content -Path $tmp; Get-Content $tmp | python "$root\core\goal_guard.py" publish-gate --root . --hook; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { $rc = $LASTEXITCODE; Remove-Item $tmp; exit $rc }; python "$root\core\goal_guard.py" hook PreToolUse; Remove-Item $tmp }
if (Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { $root = if ($env:CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT) { $env:CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT } else { '.' }; python "$root\core\goal_guard.py" hook PostToolUse }

hooks.command: root="${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-.}"; python3 "$root/core/goal_guard.py" gate --phase review_gate --root . --verify python3 "$root/scripts/loop_verify.py" >&2; python3 "$root/core/goal_guard.py" hook Stop; exit 0
hooks.commandWindows: if (Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { $root = if ($env:CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT) { $env:CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT } else { '.' }; python "$root\core\goal_guard.py" gate --phase review_gate --root . --verify python "$root\scripts\loop_verify.py" 1>&2; python "$root\core\goal_guard.py" hook Stop }
